chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1685 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For orders on stay application 5. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Chang, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner states that the Petitioner has moved an application / complaint dated 03.07.2025 (page 103 of the Court file) to the Chairman, Complaint Redressal Committee (CRC) / Director Health, Shaheed Benazirabad, but the same has not been decided as yet. Learned Counsel after arguing at length submits that the Petitioner will be satisfied if the directions are issued to the Chairman, Complaint Redressal Committee, to decide the petitioner’s application / complaint at the earliest. Learned AAG Sindh present in Court in connection with other cases has waived notice and raises no objection to the above proposition. In view of above, this Petition is disposed of, with direction to the Chairman, Complaint Redressal Committee (CRC) / Director Health, Shaheed Benazirabad, to decide the Petitioner’s aforesaid application / complaint pending before him by giving patient hearing to the Petitioner and pass an speaking Order in accordance with law within two months. The applications listed at serial No.3 & 4 also stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
